---
title: "Girke Lab"
subtitle: "Research and Teaching — University of California, Riverside"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

The Girke lab focuses on fundamental research questions at the intersection
of genome biology and chemical genomics. We develop computational methods for
analyzing large-scale omics and small molecule bioactivity data, and contribute
to the open source R/Bioconductor ecosystem.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### [About](about/about.qmd)
Overview of the lab, mission, and location.
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### [People](people/members.qmd)
Lab members, alumni, and how to get in touch.
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### [Research](research/projects/index.qmd)
Publications, projects, and software repositories.
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .g-col-md-3}
### [Positions](positions/index.qmd)
Open positions for students and postdocs.
:::

:::
